titleStmt.title: SII 27.87: original edition by M. D. Sampath, H. K. Narasimhamurthy, Madhav N. Katti and B. R. Gopal
No. 87. (A.R. No. 335 of 1931-32.) KEÑJŪRU, UDIPI TALUK, SOUTH KANARA DISTRICT.

summary.p: Slab set up in the prākāra of Viśvēśvara.

It registers a gift of money income for feeding several brahmins in the maṭha of Cheppaḷḷi probably a hamlet of Keñjūru, by Beṁmasēnabōva and Viruṇu-sēnabōva during the period of Beṁmaṇṇāi Toḷaha of Sūrāla, when mahāpradhāna Bāchaṇṇa-oḍeya of Gōve was governing Bārakūru-rājya.

It is dated Śaka 1330, Sarvajit, Bhādrapada ba. 1, Wednesday. In the given cyclic year the tithi corresponds to 1407 A.D., August 19, the weekday being Friday and the Śaka year current. In the next year (i.e. Śaka 1330, Sarvadhāri) the tithi corresponds to 1408 A.D., September 5, Wednesday, f.d.t. ·62. The latter might be the intended.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrī gaṇādhipatayē namaḥ . namastuṁga śiracuṁbi caṁdracāmara
cāravē trailōkya nagarāraṁbhaṁ mūlastaṁbhāya śaṁbhavē . svasti śrī
jayābhyudaya śakavaruṣa 1330 ttaneya sarvvajit saṁvatsarada bhā
drapada ba 1 budhavāradalu . śrīmanmahārājādhirāja rāja paramēśvara
Arirāya vibhāḍa bhāṣege tappuvarāyara gaṁḍa pūrvva dakṣiṇa paścima
samudrādhīśvara śrī vīra dēvarāyaru sukasaṁkathā vinōdadiṁ rājyava prati
pālsutidda kāladali śrīmanmahāprathānaṁ gōveya bācaṁṇṇa voḍeya
ru bārakūra rājyavanāḷuva kāladalli sūrāla beṁmaṁṇā toḷaha
ra kāladalu keṁjūru ceppaḷḷiya voḷage beṁmmasēna bōva viruṇu sē
na bōva māḍidadharmada śilāśāsana kramaveṁteṁdaḍe . kriṣṇa bāhiri tā ba
dda bāḷina mēle maṭhadali Uṁba brāhmaru 72 maṭhake koḍuva haṇa 4 [.] vaḍilava
ru tābadda bāḷinoḷage maṭhadalli Uṁba brāhmaru 72 maṭhake koḍuva haṇa 4
kuṁñaṁṇṇa hoḷatā badda bāḷinoḷage maṭhada Uṁba brāhmaru 34 maṭhake ko
ḍuva haṇa 2 kāraṁtanu tābadda bāḷinoḷage maṭhada Uṁba brāhmaru 34
maṭhake koḍuva haṇa 2 śivabāhiri tābada bāḷiṁge maṭhada Uṁba brāhma
ṇaru 24 maṭhake koḍuva haṇa 3 viṣṇu kuṁjattanu tābada bāḷiṁge ma
ṭhadali Uṁba brāhmaru 60 maṭhake koḍuva haṇa 1 nāraṇakuṁjattanu
tābadda bāḷinoḷige Uṁba brāhmaru 60 maṭhake koḍuva haṇa 1 śivamaṁ
ḍacca tānubadda bāḷiṁge maṭhada Uṁba brāhmaru 58 maṭhake koḍuva ha
ṇa kriṣṇa chātranu tābadda bāḷinoḷage maṭhada Uṁba brāhmaru 110 maṭhake
koḍuva haṇa 1 gōviṁda pāḍe tābadda bāḷinoḷage Uṁba brāhmaru ma
ṭhake 366 maṭhake koḍu haṇa ga 1 ma 2 bōgāra ceṁmaṁṇaseṭṭiya bāḷiṁ
ge teṟuva kaṭuṁdeṟu maṭhake koḍuvadu ga 1 keṟiya kasava tegava dharmma
kke taṁmma bhaktana makkaḷige nāku mūḍegadeyanū koṭṭiddu sukhadali
bāḷuvaru keṁjūru ceppaḷiya voḷage boṁmusēna bōva viruṇu
sēnabōva yibarū brāhmarige koṭṭa bāḷinavoḷage nālku vokkala kaṭṭaḷeya
voḷage prativaruṣa voṁdakke Uṁba brāhmaru yeṁṭu nūṟattoṁbha
ttu maṭhake koḍuva haṇa nāku hoṁnū Ayidu haṇavana koṭubaharu
yi bāḷiṁge toḷaharige kīḷu niṁdarige yibbara kāṇike yeraḍu teṁgi
na kāyakoṭṭu kābaru yi dharmmada brāhmaranū sarvvamānyavāgi naḍa
sibaharu keṁjūra ceppaḷiya vūru toḷahara saṁnidhiyali barada śilā
śāsanakke maṁgaḷamahā śrī śrī śrī svadattāṁ paradattaṁ vā yō harēti vasuṁ
dharā ṣaṣṭhirvvaruṣa sahasrāṇi viṣṭhāyāṁ jāyatē krimi . sēna bō
vanu kuṭuṁbavanū kūḍikoṁḍu malakiseṭṭi barasi naḍasida śilāśāsana śrī śrī śrī
yi dharmake Ārobbaru tappidaru vāraṇāsiyali nūṟa Eṁṭu kapileya
yaḷisida dōṣakke hōharu .
Digital edition of SII 27.87 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
